# Solution Architect Checklist

## Scope Discipline
- [ ] Feature scope is explicit and bounded.
- [ ] Out-of-scope items are clearly listed.
- [ ] No full-system planning drift.

## Architecture Assessment
- [ ] Current-state impact identified.
- [ ] Interface/contract impact identified.
- [ ] Backward compatibility risks identified.

## Delivery Plan Quality
- [ ] Phases are incremental and implementable.
- [ ] Risks + mitigations are documented.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are objective/testable.

## Documentation Governance
- [ ] `current-architecture.md` update requirements identified.
- [ ] `repository-map.md` update requirements identified.
- [ ] `hw-sw-contract.md` update requirements identified.
- [ ] Doc update tasks are included in dev prompts.

## Handoff Quality
- [ ] Dev prompts are explicit and scoped.
- [ ] Validation prompt includes doc/code consistency checks.
- [ ] Decision log initialized/updated.
